item.title: Elements
item.description:
Table of Contents
  1. Heading 2
    1. Heading 3
      1. Heading 4
        1. Heading 5
    2. Emphasis
    3. Button
    4. Link
    5. Paragraph
    6. Ordered List
    7. Unordered List
    8. Notice
    9. Tab
    10. Accordions
    11. Code and Syntax Highlighting
    12. Blockquote
    13. Tables
    14. Image
    15. Gallery
    16. Slider
    17. Youtube video
    18. Custom video

Here is an example of headings. You can use this heading by the following markdown rules. For example: use # for heading 1 and use ###### for heading 6.

item.title: Privacy
item.description:
Responsibility of Contributors
